what: Record R code as it is typed
title: matahari
text: record R code typed, use dance_start() dance_stop() functions. time dance_start() run, data frame logging subsequent code updated. start new data frame, can use dance_remove() re-run dance_start(). default, just records R calls typed R console, populating expr column data frame. can optionally also record following setting parameter name TRUE. rely using RStudio IDE. value: values computed path: path file focus RStudio editor contents: file contents RStudio editor tab focus selection: text highlighted RStudio editor tab focus example, code value = TRUE results following tidy data frame. Notice now value column now populated.
code: # Start logging your R commands run in the console dance_start()  4 + 4 "wow!" mean(1:10)  # Pause logging dance_stop()  # Look at your log as a tidy data frame dance_tbl() #> # A tibble: 6 x 6 #>   expr       value             path      contents  selection dt                  #>   <list>     <list>            <list>    <list>    <list>    <dttm>              #> 1 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:24 #> 2 <language> <lgl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:24 #> 3 <language> <lgl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:25 #> 4 <chr [1]>  <lgl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:25 #> 5 <language> <lgl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:25 #> 6 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2019-05-14 08:15:25 dance_remove() # Start logging your R commands run in the console dance_start(value = TRUE)  4 + 4 "wow!" mean(1:10)  # Pause logging dance_stop()  # Look at your log as a tidy data frame dance_tbl() #> # A tibble: 6 x 6 #>   expr       value             path      contents  selection dt                  #>   <list>     <list>            <list>    <list>    <list>    <dttm>              #> 1 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:06 #> 2 <language> <int [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:06 #> 3 <language> <dbl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:07 #> 4 <chr [1]>  <chr [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:08 #> 5 <language> <dbl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:08 #> 6 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:09

what: Input a character string of R code
title: matahari
text: Alternatively can input string R code output tidy data frame, using dance_recital() function. creates expr value columns dance_start() dance_stop() workflow described . addition, outputs errors, output, warnings, messages generated R code character string. Notice data frame session information, since called interactively R console. default, dance_recital() evaluate R code passed retrieve value column. like just output expr column, can set evaluate = FALSE. may especially useful analyzing lots code take long time run commands.
code: dance_recital(" 4 + 4 'wow!' mean(1:10)              ") #> # A tibble: 3 × 6 #>   expr       value     error  output    warnings  messages  #>   <list>     <list>    <list> <list>    <list>    <list>    #> 1 <language> <dbl [1]> <NULL> <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]> #> 2 <chr [1]>  <chr [1]> <NULL> <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]> #> 3 <language> <dbl [1]> <NULL> <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]>

title: matahari
text: dance_recital() function can used analyze .R file. Instead including code character string, pass path .R file. example file included package.
code: file <- system.file("test", "sample_code.R", package = "matahari") dance_recital(file) #> # A tibble: 7 × 6 #>   expr       value     error      output    warnings  messages  #>   <list>     <list>    <list>     <list>    <list>    <list>    #> 1 <language> <dbl [1]> <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]> #> 2 <chr [1]>  <chr [1]> <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]> #> 3 <language> <dbl [1]> <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]> #> 4 <language> <NULL>    <smplErrr> <NULL>    <NULL>    <NULL>    #> 5 <language> <chr [1]> <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [1]> <chr [0]> #> 6 <language> <NULL>    <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [1]> #> 7 <language> <NULL>    <NULL>     <chr [1]> <chr [0]> <chr [0]>

text: Kross S, D'Agostino McGowan L (2026). matahari: Spy R Session. R package version 0.1.4, https://github.com/jhudsl/matahari.
code: @Manual{,   title = {matahari: Spy on Your R Session},   author = {Sean Kross and Lucy {D'Agostino McGowan}},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.4},   url = {https://github.com/jhudsl/matahari}, }

title: Spy on Your R Session
text: simple package tidy logging everything type R console.

title: Spy on Your R Session
text: can install matahari CRAN : GitHub :
code: install.packages("matahari") # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("jhudsl/matahari")

title: Spy on Your R Session
code: library(matahari) library(tidyverse) library(knitr)  # Start logging your commands dance_start(value = TRUE)  4 + 4 "wow!" mean(1:10)  # Pause logging dance_stop()  # Look at your log as a tibble dance_tbl()  ## # A tibble: 6 x 6 ##   expr       value             path      contents  selection dt                  ##   <list>     <list>            <list>    <list>    <list>    <dttm>              ## 1 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:06 ## 2 <language> <int [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:06 ## 3 <language> <dbl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:07 ## 4 <chr [1]>  <chr [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:08 ## 5 <language> <dbl [1]>         <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:08 ## 6 <language> <S3: sessionInfo> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> <lgl [1]> 2018-06-23 15:26:09  # Do data science dance_tbl() %>%   slice(2:(n() - 1)) %>%   select(expr, value) %>%   mutate(class = map_chr(expr, class)) %>%   kable()  ## |expr                      |value |class     | ## |:-------------------------|:-----|:---------| ## |dance_start(value = TRUE) |1     |call      | ## |4 + 4                     |8     |call      | ## |wow!                      |wow!  |character | ## |mean(1:10)                |5.5   |call      |

title: Spy on Your R Session
code: library(matahari) library(tidyverse) library(knitr)  code_file <- system.file("test", "sample_code.R", package = "matahari")  code_file %>%   dance_recital() %>%    kable()    ## |expr                |result   |error           |output   |warnings |messages | ## |:-------------------|:--------|:---------------|:--------|:--------|:--------| ## |4 + 4               |8        |NULL            |         |         |         | ## |wow!                |wow!     |NULL            |         |         |         | ## |mean(1:10)          |5.5      |NULL            |         |         |         | ## |stop("Error!")      |NULL     |Error!, .f(...) |NULL     |NULL     |NULL     | ## |warning("Warning!") |Warning! |NULL            |         |Warning! |         | ## |message("Hello?")   |NULL     |NULL            |         |         |Hello?   | ## |cat("Welcome!")     |NULL     |NULL            |Welcome! |         |         |  code_string <- "set.seed(42)\nx <- sample(1:10, 5)\nmedian(x)"  code_string %>%   dance_recital() %>%    kable()  ## |expr                 |result         |error |output |warnings |messages | ## |:--------------------|:--------------|:-----|:------|:--------|:--------| ## |set.seed(42)         |NULL           |NULL  |       |         |         | ## |x <- sample(1:10, 5) |10, 9, 3, 6, 4 |NULL  |       |         |         | ## |median(x)            |6              |NULL  |       |         |         |

what: Create a matahari-esque data frame from a file. — dance_recital
title: Create a matahari-esque data frame from a file. — dance_recital
text: Create matahari-esque data frame file.

title: Create a matahari-esque data frame from a file. — dance_recital
code: dance_recital(code, evaluate = TRUE)

title: Create a matahari-esque data frame from a file. — dance_recital
text: code string path file containing R code. evaluate Logical, indicating whether evaluate code, default TRUE

title: Create a matahari-esque data frame from a file. — dance_recital
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{  library(knitr)  # Evaluate a string of R code kable(dance_recital("x <- 4; x *7"))  ## |expr   |value |error |output |warnings     |messages     | ## |:------|:-----|:-----|:------|:------------|:------------| ## |x <- 4 |4     |NULL  |       |character(0) |character(0) | ## |x * 7  |28    |NULL  |       |character(0) |character(0) |  # Evaluate an R script. We have provided an R script for testing purposes. code_file <- system.file("test", "sample_code.R", package = "matahari") kable(dance_recital(code_file)[,1:3])  ## |expr                |value    |error                                    | ## |:-------------------|:--------|:----------------------------------------| ## |4 + 4               |8        |NULL                                     | ## |wow!                |wow!     |NULL                                     | ## |mean(1:10)          |5.5      |NULL                                     | ## |stop("Error!")      |NULL     |list(message = "Error!", call = .f(...)) | ## |warning("Warning!") |Warning! |NULL                                     | ## |message("Hello?")   |NULL     |NULL                                     | ## |cat("Welcome!")     |NULL     |NULL                                     | } # }

title: Remove your logging history. — dance_remove
text: Remove logging history.

title: Remove your logging history. — dance_remove
code: dance_remove()

title: Remove your logging history. — dance_remove
text: Either TRUE log removed FALSE log exist (invisibly).

title: Remove your logging history. — dance_remove
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(knitr)  # Start recording dance_start(value = TRUE)  # Execute some expressions "Hello!" 4 + 4  # Stop recording dance_stop()  # Access log of your session kable(dance_tbl()[3:4, 1:5])  ## |expr   |value  |path |contents |selection | ## |:------|:------|:----|:--------|:---------| ## |Hello! |Hello! |NA   |NA       |NA        | ## |4 + 4  |8      |NA   |NA       |NA        |  # Deletes the lgo of your session dance_remove()  # With no log, dance_tbl() returns NULL invisibly. withVisible(dance_tbl())  ## $value ## NULL ## ## $visible ## FALSE  } # }

what: Copy the log to your clipboard. — dance_report
title: Copy the log to your clipboard. — dance_report
text: Copy log clipboard.

title: Copy the log to your clipboard. — dance_report
code: dance_report(...)

title: Copy the log to your clipboard. — dance_report
text: ... Developer options.

title: Copy the log to your clipboard. — dance_report
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{  # Start recording dance_start(value = TRUE)  # Execute some expressions "Hello!" 4 + 4  # Stop recording dance_stop()  # Assign a base64 encoded tibble of your log to a variable report_code <- dance_report() substr(report_code, 1, 10)  ## "WAoAAAADAA"  nchar(report_code)  ## 397432 } # }

what: Save the log as an rds file. — dance_save
title: Save the log as an rds file. — dance_save
text: Save log rds file.

title: Save the log as an rds file. — dance_save
code: dance_save(path)

title: Save the log as an rds file. — dance_save
text: path path rds file.

title: Save the log as an rds file. — dance_save
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{  # Start recording dance_start(value = TRUE)  # Execute some expressions "Hello!" 4 + 4  # Stop recording dance_stop()  # Save your log locally dance_save("session.rds") } # }

title: Start Spying — dance_start
text: Start logging R console activity. using RStudio contents current editor tab also tracked. logging takes place R code executed R console.

title: Start Spying — dance_start
code: dance_start(   expr = TRUE,   value = FALSE,   path = FALSE,   contents = FALSE,   selection = FALSE )

title: Start Spying — dance_start
text: expr R expressions typed R console logged unless set FALSE. value Values computed R console logged unless set FALSE. path path file focus RStudio editor logged unless set FALSE. contents file contents RStudio editor tab focus logged unless set FALSE. selection text highlighted RStudio editor tab focus logged unless set FALSE.

title: Start Spying — dance_start
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Begin recording your R session. dance_start()  # Each of the following expressions adds a row to the tibble that tracks # the execution of your R code. "Hello!" 4 + 4 x <- 7 x^2 rm(x) x  # This stops recording your R session. dance_stop() } # }

title: Stop Spying — dance_stop
text: Pause current logging session.

title: Stop Spying — dance_stop
code: dance_stop()

title: Stop Spying — dance_stop
text: TRUE logging taking place, otherwise FALSE (invisibly).

title: Stop Spying — dance_stop
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Begin recording your R session. dance_start()  # Each expression adds a row to the tibble that tracks the execution of # your R code. x <- 7 x * 4  # This stops recording your R session. dance_stop() } # }

what: Get the log as a tibble — dance_tbl
title: Get the log as a tibble — dance_tbl
text: Get log tibble

title: Get the log as a tibble — dance_tbl
code: dance_tbl()

title: Get the log as a tibble — dance_tbl
text: Either tibble::tibble() containing logged history NULL. log.

title: Get the log as a tibble — dance_tbl
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{  library(knitr)  # Start recording dance_start(value = TRUE)  # Execute some expressions "Hello!" 4 + 4  # Stop recording dance_stop()  # Access log of your session dance_tbl()  # Display the log nicely kable(dance_tbl()[3:4, 1:5])  ## |expr   |value  |path |contents |selection | ## |:------|:------|:----|:--------|:---------| ## |Hello! |Hello! |NA   |NA       |NA        | ## |4 + 4  |8      |NA   |NA       |NA        |  } # }
